race.comment: PANELLI (2) raced on the speed when resuming last start and fought gamely to only miss by a head here. Strips fitter and can go one better with Gallagher again piloting. LITLFELA (8) lifted strongly only to just miss last start over 1400m at this track. Will likely drift back from his draw and be charging late. REGALADE (3) makes his stable debut for Brett Robb after making the move from Vic. His figures over the border line up well for this and he's worth some thought a month between runs. NOTHING FINER (9) finds it tough to break through but is knocking on the door and doesn't need to improve much to break through, though he will need some luck from out there.
